name: Crockpot Chicken Marengo
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken parts in the crockpot.
2. Combine spaghetti sauce mix with wine and pour over the chicken.
3. Cover and cook on low for 6-7 hours.
4. Turn the control to high.
5. Add tomatoes and mushrooms.
6. Cover and cook on high for 30-40 minutes, or until tomatoes are done.
